_comment: Track-ordered 2x2 camera groups for the mosaic prebuild. Sources are gs:// URIs into the class bucket (run build_camera_mosaics.py where the bucket is readable, e.g. Cloud Shell). Each group's 4 panels are physically consecutive cameras in TRAVEL order (TL->TR->BL->BR). 'src_offset_s' is the offset into each source file at which the group's start_utc occurs (CCTV blocks per camera start at slightly different local times, so offsets differ per panel). Order was derived from each camera's burned-in turn label. Fill the remaining groups the same way for full-track coverage (24 cams -> 6 groups).
